title: Flask runs with debug=True
evidence: app.py:196 app.run(host="0.0.0.0", port=5000, debug=True) — exposes the Werkzeug interactive debugger/PIN and enables the reloader if run as-is
suggestion: Gate debug behind an env var or default to debug=False for anything resembling production

title: Author filter is a substring LIKE match, not exact
evidence: app.py:113-114 SELECT ... WHERE author LIKE ?, (f"%{author}%") — ?author=Alice also matches 'Alicent'; satisfies R3 but is broader than an exact filter
suggestion: Acceptable; note the substring semantics in the README if exact match is intended
